description: Design an automated approval workflow for high-value wire transfers in a banking system. The workflow must: (1) route transfers over $500K to a compliance officer within 60 seconds, (2) auto-approve transfers from a pre-approved counterparty whitelist without human review if under $2M, (3) hard-block any transfer where the beneficiary appears on the OFAC SDN list regardless of amount, (4) produce a timestamped audit record for every decision — approve, block, or route-to-human — before the transfer is executed.
context: Current system: all transfers above $100K require manual review, which creates a 2-hour backlog. Whitelisted counterparties: 47 pre-approved correspondent banks. OFAC SDN list: updated daily at 02:00 UTC, must be checked against the version current at transfer initiation time. Audit trail: must be written to an append-only ledger before the transfer instruction is sent to the payment rail. Compliance officer availability: 24/7 on-call rotation, maximum 60-second acknowledgment SLA.

checks.text: Does the proposal route non-whitelisted transfers over $500K to a human compliance officer within 60 seconds?
Does the proposal auto-approve whitelisted counterparty transfers under $2M without requiring human review?
Does the proposal hard-block OFAC SDN matches before the transfer is executed, with an audit record written before the block decision?

should_prune.description: Proposal that writes the audit record after the transfer is executed rather than before the decision
should_prune.violates: HITL/3 — audit record must precede the transfer decision and execution

should_prune.description: Proposal that routes all transfers including whitelisted ones through human review regardless of amount
should_prune.violates: HITL/2 — whitelisted counterparties under $2M must be auto-approved

should_pass: Proposal with a decision tree: (1) OFAC check first — if match, write BLOCKED audit record, reject; (2) if counterparty on whitelist AND amount < $2M, write AUTO_APPROVED audit record, release; (3) otherwise write PENDING_REVIEW audit record, enqueue to compliance queue with 60s SLA timer, await human decision via callback.
